title: A widget to plan a meeting : vote for a time session
excerpt: I tried to integrate Doodle polls on a view on my project but it seems it is not possible to integrate it (even with an iframe). I need to plan several meetings for my project with people in different timelines and I cou…

posts.author: Lorine (Lorine Gorin)
posts.cookedHtml: I tried to integrate Doodle polls on a view on my project but it seems it is not possible to integrate it (even with an iframe). I need to plan several meetings for my project with people in different timelines and I couldn’t find a vote option suiting my needs. Would it be possible to create a widget similar to Doodle proprosing time slots and users and viewers can put their availabilities.
